description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New post (Published: June 2, 2026)

Hanno City has revised its "Hanno City Action Plan for New Influenza and Similar Threats" in May 2026 (Reiwa 8). The revision reflects lessons learned from COVID-19 between 2020 and 2023, and aligns with updated national and Saitama Prefecture pandemic plans.

The plan aims to limit the spread of new infectious diseases that could become pandemics—such as novel influenza or coronavirus variants—while protecting residents' lives and health and minimizing impacts on daily life and the local economy.

The revised plan is available in PDF format on the Hanno City official website.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/13616.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City updates its pandemic preparedness plan (May 2026 revision)
